recommendations.title: But I'm a Cheerleader
recommendations.overview: Megan is an all-American girl. A cheerleader. She has a boyfriend. But Megan doesn't like kissing her boyfriend very much. And she's pretty touchy with her cheerleader friends. Her conservative parents worry that she must be a lesbian and send her of

recommendations.title: Breaking the Girls
recommendations.overview: A naive college student loses a scholarship at the hands of a classmate and makes a pact with a mysterious friend to kill off each other's enemies.

recommendations.title: Addicted to Fresno
recommendations.overview: Two co-dependent sisters, a recovering sex addict and a lonely lesbian who work as hotel maids in Fresno, go to ludicrous lengths to cover up an accidental crime.

recommendations.title: The Quiet
recommendations.overview: After her widowed father dies, deaf teenager Dot moves in with her godparents, Olivia and Paul Deer. The Deers' daughter, Nina, is openly hostile to Dot, but that does not prevent her from telling her secrets to her silent stepsister, including the f

recommendations.title: Don't Blame the Kid
recommendations.overview: After a one-night stand results in pregnancy, a young woman decides to become partners with the emotionally immature father-to-be.

recommendations.title: Pickup on South Street
recommendations.overview: In New York City, an insolent pickpocket, Skip McCoy, inadvertently sets off a chain of events when he targets ex-prostitute Candy and steals her wallet. Unaware that she has been making deliveries of highly classified information to the communists,

recommendations.title: My Boyfriend's Meds
recommendations.overview: A Woman's island getaway with her boyfriend is thrown for a loop when he forgets to take his prescription medications along.

recommendations.title: Empire of Dreams: The Story of the Star Wars Trilogy
recommendations.overview: From the earliest versions of the script to the blockbuster debuts, explore the creation of the Star Wars Trilogy.

recommendations.title: In China They Eat Dogs
recommendations.overview: Arvid is an ordinary bank clerk who lives a rather unassuming life with his dear girlfriend. But his life is turned completely upside down when he bravely manages to avert a robbery against the bank where he works.

recommendations.title: John Mulaney: Baby J
recommendations.overview: A chaotic intervention. An action-packed stay in rehab. After a weird couple of years, John Mulaney comes out swinging in his return to the stage.
